title: Vanilla++
description: A modpack based on my Vanilla+ pack that adds non-vanilla features, while keeping the vanilla feel
body:
![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c72fd31034c929f275b877e9e7a3a52d72ba2af5.png)

Vanilla++ is a modpack aimed at adding new features to the base game, while still keeping the overall vanilla feel. A variety of client-side performance and qol mods, such as Sodium and JEI are included, in addition to many new ones that add brand new features and overhaul existing ones, such as Trading Post or Easy Magic.

If you want a less modded experience for the base vanilla game, check out my [Vanilla+ pack](https://modrinth.com/modpack/vanilla+client)

-----

## **Resource Packs:**

[Axolotl Bucket Variants](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/axolotl-bucket-variants)

[Colorful Sheared Sheep](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/colorful-sheared-sheep)

[Xali's Enchanted Books](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/xalis-enchanted-books)

[Vanilla Tweaks](https://vanillatweaks.net/picker/resource-packs/) (Reccomended, Not Included)

## **Shader Packs:**

[BSL Shaders](https://modrinth.com/shader/bsl-shaders)

[Super Duper Vanilla](https://modrinth.com/shader/super-duper-vanilla)
